case_title: DOUG WOLENS VS. KAREN TAYLOR ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY WOLENS, DOUG AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, KAREN LEVI STRAUSS & CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEVI STRAUSS & CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOLENS, DOUG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TAYLOR, KAREN LEVI STRAUSS & CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT KAREN TAYLOR IS RETURNED = WITH YELLOW POSTAL STICKER THAT SAYS NOREC 941141012-1N 12/22/14

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR BOTH DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SHEENA KUNHIRAMAN--COLLEAGUE. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT LEVI STRAUSS ON DECEMBER 4, 2014 RETURNED=RETURN TO SENDER NO SUCH NUMBER, UNABLE TO FORWARD
